question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/controller/TopicController.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getTopic()] Can an unprivileged external user call getTopic() and receive the autoRenewPeriod and expiryTimestamp without any ownership check, enabling them to calculate the exact expiry time and submit a competing renewal transaction before the owner, effectively hijacking the renewal without signer approval?
